clinical_notes: 25yo male, Lucas Almeida, complains of mild nasal congestion, runny nose, and a scratchy throat for 3 days. No SOB, no chest pain. 0 red flags.

55yo male, Carlos Oliveira, presenting with numbness in lower extremities and chronic non-healing foot ulcer. History of poorly controlled type 2 diabetes and hypertension. High cardiovascular risk profile.

62yo female, Sandra Souza, presenting with acute respiratory distress, severe wheezing, and inability to speak in full sentences. History of severe COPD and asthma. Known anaphylactic allergy to penicillin.
41yo female, Juliana Ribeiro, reports mild earache and low-grade headache since yesterday morning. Denies fever, vision changes, or stiff neck. Routine priority, no red flags.

68yo male, Francisco Souza, with history of CHF, chronic AFib on anticoagulants, and CKD. Presenting with acute severe dyspnea, orthopnea, and 3+ bilateral pitting edema in lower extremities. Jugular venous distension present.

74yo female, Tereza Menezes, history of ischemic cardiomyopathy (low EF), stage 3 CKD, and diabetes. Brought due to severe lethargy, worsening generalized weakness, and palpitations. High clinical suspicion of acute decompensated heart failure.
